artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent industry figures. His work has involved associations with artists such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used in various productions.

His approach to production is characterized by a focus on the rhythmic and textural elements inherent to moombahton and dancehall genres. The sample pack serves as both a creative resource and a window into his production techniques.

Noizekid's work is situated within a broader network of electronic music producers. Similar artists include ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
